entry.title: New IDC 1332KP21DNEEB0011 awarded to EARTH RESOURCES TECHNOLOGY, INC. for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Only AGO/SIAD warranted Contracting Officers may place orders

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IDIQ TO SUPPORT THE OPERATIONS, MAINTENANCE AND SUSTAINMENT OF NOAA'S LEGACY SATELLITE GROUND SYSTEMS

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM - BUSINESS APPLICATION/APPLICATION DEVELOPMENT SUPPORT SERVICES (LABOR)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
